nasb.text: But the Lord took me from following the flock and the Lord said to me, ‘Go prophesy to My people Israel.’

esv.text: But the Lord took me from following the flock, and the Lord said to me, ‘Go, prophesy to my people Israel.’

cnv.text: 但耶和華選召我，叫我不再跟隨羊群；他對我說：‘你去，向我民以色列說預言。’

ccb.text: 但耶和华不再让我看守羊群，祂对我说，‘去！向我的以色列子民说预言。’
